cv.title: My Curriculum Vitae
cv.subtitle: Manage, preview and download your professional CV

tips.title: Tips to optimize your CV
tips.tip1: Keep your CV concise (1-2 pages max) and focused on relevant experiences
tips.tip2: Use action verbs and quantify your achievements (%, $, time saved...)
tips.tip3: Adapt your CV to each job offer (keywords from the position)
tips.tip4: Update regularly with your new skills and certifications

cv.pageDescription: Boost your CV with ATS optimization
cv.heroSubtitle: Real-time ATS analysis, automatic enrichment from your certifications and labs, before/after score guaranteed.
cv.sourceFidelityHint: When on, the boost follows your file and avoids extra platform context. Turn off to enrich with your Subul labs, certs, and profile.
cv.lowScore: Low ATS score — let's fix it
cv.greatScoreDesc: Your CV is well-structured. Enhancing it with your platform data will push it even further.
cv.averageScoreDesc: Your CV has some gaps. ATS filters may catch issues before a recruiter sees it.
cv.lowScoreDesc: Your CV will likely be filtered out by automated ATS systems. Boosting is strongly recommended.
cv.scanningStatus: Analyzing your CV — estimating your ATS score…
cv.boostingStatus: Enhancing your CV with AI — this can take up to a few minutes…
cv.recentJobsSubtitle: From Subul and our job search — no upload required.
cv.recentJobsEmpty: No listings right now. Try again later.
cv.recentJobsError: Could not load jobs. Check your connection and try again.
cv.yourCvReadyDesc: Enriched with your SUBUL data. Switch format instantly — no re-generation needed.
cv.errorHint: Make sure NestJS (port 3001) and CV Booster (port 8003) are running.

facts.fact1: "75% of CVs are rejected before being read by a human due to ATS filters."
facts.fact2: "Recruiters spend an average of 7 seconds on a CV."
facts.fact3: "An ATS-optimized CV increases your chances of an interview by 3x."
facts.fact4: "An ATS looks for exact keyword matches with the job description."
facts.fact5: "Data Analyst roles requiring dbt or Snowflake grew by 47% in 2024."
